title: Files should avoid having too many lines of code
description: Files should not have too many lines of codeAnalyze your codeadaptability-focusedmaintainabilityCode Smellbrain-overloadWhy is this an issue?When a source file grows too much, it can accumulate numerous responsibilities and become challenging to understand and maintain.Above a specific threshold, refactor the file into smaller files whose code focuses on well-defined tasks. Those smaller files will be easier to understand and test.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Files should avoid having too many lines of code - consider splitting into smaller, focused files
